PETITION Petition For Order Authorizing Creation Of Trust, Transfer Of Community Property To Trust, Confirmation Of Community Property And Waiver Of Bond
Off Calendar Oct-29-2007 Advanced From Oct-29-07 To Oct-09-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION Petition For Order Authorizing Creation Of Trust, Transfer Of Community Property To Trust, Confirmation Of Community Property And Waiver Of Bond
Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Beverly Smith appearing for and with petition Mr. Leung. Counsel presented the Court with a copy of the declaration and the proposed order. Verification issue addressed. Court wanted a second declaration stating that the verification was attached to the petition when it was filed. Matter submitted.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Rhonda Fung CSR# 4819. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: A. Aguerre.
